category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an authorization service and policy engine based on Google Zanzibar; official GitHub description says it builds fine-grained authorization systems.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is permify; official GitHub repository and docs use Permify.
docs_sources: Official docs.permify.co redirects to FusionAuth-hosted Permify/FGA documentation with quickstart, modeling, API, and setup sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/Permify/permify; per instruction repo returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names authorization service, policy engine, and Google Zanzibar; official docs navigation includes RBAC, ABAC, ReBAC, and API references.
